questions.text: Work done is zero when force and displacement are:
questions.explanation: Work = F × s × cos θ. When θ = 90° (perpendicular), cos 90° = 0, so work done = 0.

questions.text: Energy can neither be created nor destroyed.
questions.explanation: This is the law of conservation of energy. Energy can only be transformed from one form to another.

questions.correctAnswer: The energy possessed by an object due to its motion.
questions.explanation: Kinetic energy = (1/2)mv², where m is mass and v is velocity of the object.

questions.text: The SI unit of power is ________.
questions.explanation: Power is the rate of doing work. 1 watt = 1 joule/second.
